Name: Anti-Aliasing
Description: Controls anti-aliasing techniques including post-process edge smoothing (FXAA/DLAA) and temporal accumulation. Provides fine control over edge detection, temporal feedback, sharpening, and stability to balance image quality and performance.

Fields.Name: Enable Anti-Alias
Fields.Description: Enables or disables the anti-aliasing system. When disabled, no edge smoothing or temporal accumulation is applied.

Fields.Name: Anti-Alias Type
Fields.Description: Selects the anti-aliasing method. Determines which parameters are active.

Fields.Name: FXAA: Alpha
Fields.Description: Controls blending strength of FXAA edge smoothing. Higher values increase smoothing but may blur fine detail.

Fields.Name: FXAA: Reduce Minimum
Fields.Description: Minimum edge detection threshold for FXAA. Lower values make the filter more sensitive to subtle edges.

Fields.Name: FXAA: Reduce Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier controlling edge detection sensitivity. Higher values reduce over-blurring by limiting weak edge influence.

Fields.Name: FXAA: Span Max
Fields.Description: Maximum sampling span for FXAA edge search. Higher values improve quality on large edges but increase cost.

Fields.Name: DLAA: Threshold
Fields.Description: Edge detection threshold for DLAA. Determines how strong a contrast must be to be treated as an edge.

Fields.Name: DLAA: Smoothing Strength
Fields.Description: Controls smoothing strength in DLAA. Higher values increase blending across detected edges.

Fields.Name: DLAA: Epsilon
Fields.Description: Small bias value to stabilize DLAA edge detection and prevent noise or flickering.

Fields.Name: Feedback Weight
Fields.Description: Base weight of previous frame contribution in temporal anti-aliasing. Higher values increase stability but can cause ghosting.

Fields.Name: Jitter Count
Fields.Description: Number of subpixel jitter samples used in temporal anti-aliasing. Higher values improve convergence but may increase flicker.

Fields.Name: Enable Dither Switch
Fields.Description: Enables dithering to reduce banding and improve perceived smoothness in low-contrast areas.

Fields.Name: Enable Motion Vector Dilation
Fields.Description: Expands motion vectors into neighboring pixels to improve temporal reprojection stability, especially on thin geometry.

Fields.Name: Sharpen Intensity
Fields.Description: Strength of sharpening applied after anti-aliasing to recover lost detail.

Fields.Name: Sharpen Range Minimum
Fields.Description: Minimum luminance or contrast threshold for sharpening to take effect.

Fields.Name: Sharpen Range Maximum
Fields.Description: Maximum luminance or contrast range for sharpening. Helps limit sharpening to appropriate detail levels.

Fields.Name: Subpixel Feedback Factor
Fields.Description: Controls accumulation strength for subpixel details in temporal AA. Higher values improve fine detail stability.

Fields.Name: CB Feedback Weight Sampled
Fields.Description: Weight applied to directly sampled history color during temporal blending.

Fields.Name: CB Feedback Weight Filtered
Fields.Description: Weight applied to filtered or neighborhood-clamped history samples to reduce ghosting artifacts.

Fields.Name: Enable Stencil Mask
Fields.Description: Restricts anti-aliasing to specific screen regions using the stencil buffer.

Fields.Name: Rejected Pixel Blur Intensity
Fields.Description: Amount of blur applied to pixels rejected during temporal reprojection, helping hide discontinuities.

Fields.Name: Feedback Weight Scale (None)
Fields.Description: Scaling factor applied to feedback weight when no special condition (e.g., motion or depth change) is detected.

Fields.Name: Feedback Weight Scale (0)
Fields.Description: Feedback weight scaling for condition set 0 (typically low motion or stable pixels).

Fields.Name: Feedback Weight Scale (1)
Fields.Description: Feedback weight scaling for condition set 1 (moderate motion or variation).

Fields.Name: Feedback Weight Scale (2)
Fields.Description: Feedback weight scaling for condition set 2 (high motion or instability).

Fields.Name: Feedback Weight Cancel By Depth (0)
Fields.Description: Amount of temporal feedback reduction based on depth differences for condition set 0.

Fields.Name: Feedback Weight Cancel By Depth (1)
Fields.Description: Amount of temporal feedback reduction based on depth differences for condition set 1.

Fields.Name: Feedback Weight Cancel By Depth (2)
Fields.Description: Amount of temporal feedback reduction based on depth differences for condition set 2.

Fields.Name: Feedback Weight Cancel By Depth (3)
Fields.Description: Amount of temporal feedback reduction based on depth differences for condition set 3.

Fields.Name: Feedback Weight Border Depth (0)
Fields.Description: Depth threshold defining when feedback reduction begins for condition set 0.

Fields.Name: Feedback Weight Border Depth (1)
Fields.Description: Depth threshold defining when feedback reduction begins for condition set 1.

Fields.Name: Feedback Weight Border Depth (2)
Fields.Description: Depth threshold defining when feedback reduction begins for condition set 2.
